name: Ryvu Therapeutics S.A.
summary: Ryvu Therapeutics S.A., a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company, engages in developing of novel small molecule therapies for treatment of oncology. Its lead candidate, SEL120, is a CDK8 kinase inhibitor with potential for development in hematological malignancies and solid tumors, which is in Phase 1b study for the treatment of acute myeloid leukemia and myelodysplastic syndrome. The company's products also include SEL24/MEN1703, a dual PIM/FLT3 kinase inhibitor licensed to the Menarini Group has completed Phase 1 clinical trial for the treatment of acute myeloid leukemia. In addition, its early pipeline candidates include candidates in the area of kinases, cancer metabolism, synthetic lethality, and immuno-oncology. Ryvu Therapeutics S.A. was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Krak√É¬≥w, Poland.
